name: Ashen Halls
description: In the ruins of his ancestral keep, monster hunter Ervart Goldschmied and arcana expert Velimira Malinova hunt a Ruby Phoenix  and find themselves drawn into a night of danger, flirtation, and forbidden magic. But when Ervart reveals a shadowed power strong enough to bring the beast down, Velimira discovers that the charming fallen noble carries a debt far darker than his smile suggests.
